title: leea zippeliana
intro: Leea zippeliana, also known as Leea zippeliana or Makabuhay in some regions, is a plant species that belongs to the family Vitaceae and is native to the Philippines. The leaves and roots of this plant are used in traditional medicine, possessing antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and serving as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Leea zippeliana can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
